description: A cartographer is preparing a Sustainable Development Goals atlas and needs to integrate World Bank development indicators with a world countries basemap. Join the World Bank indicators CSV (/home/ga/gvsig_data/world_bank_indicators.csv) to the Natural Earth countries shapefile (/home/ga/gvsig_data/countries/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp) using the ISO_A3 and ISO3 fields as the matching keys. Export the combined dataset as a new shapefile to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/countries_with_indicators.shp. The exported shapefile must contain all original country attributes plus the indicator fields: CO2_PC, LIFE_EXP, and INTERNET_PCT.
